top_level_assets.coverage_note: Six RIASEC dimensions exist as deep-copy content, but they are not packaged as V2 selector slots.
Top-3 chain copy exists for a subset of code patterns; no 216 route matrix or selector reference layer exists.
Pair blend coverage exists for 15 dimension pairs; not yet expressed as selector conflict-resolution assets.
Large activity example table exists in zh-CN only; it is not route-addressable by V2 selector.
Occupation examples include safety boundaries but require share-safe and no-recommendation QA before selector use.
Share/PDF/history copy exists for en and zh-CN, but no dedicated V2 share_safety_registry exists.
Low-quality cautious copy exists in zh-CN only; no route matrix or selector fallback binding exists.

gap_register.finding: No RIASEC Result Page V2 selector-ready asset package exists under result_page_v2.
No RIASEC route matrix rows, canonical profile matrix, selector reference resolution table, or conflict-resolution report exists.
gap_register.evidence: result_page_v2 currently contains source_ledger and this QA folder only.

gap_register.finding: No canonical-profile or golden-case package exists for RIASEC Result Page V2.
gap_register.evidence: No result_page_v2 selector_qa_policy golden cases or route-driven golden case QA files exist.

gap_register.finding: Share/PDF/history v1 assets exist, but there is no V2 share_safety registry or selector allowlist that proves public share blocks cannot expose raw scores, private payloads, career-match claims, or occupational ranking.
gap_register.evidence: share_pdf_history_v1.en.json and share_pdf_history_v1.zh-CN.json exist; no share_safety_registry exists under result_page_v2.

gap_register.finding: Low-quality cautious copy exists only as a zh-CN v1 asset and is not wired to route-matrix fallback, selector trigger policy, or share-safe redaction.
gap_register.evidence: low_quality_cautious_reading_v1.zh-CN.json exists with fallback_behavior=omit_module; no V2 selector trigger matrix exists.

gap_register.finding: Many v1 assets declare frontend_fallback_allowed=false and omit-module fallback, but there is no V2 selector policy proving missing content fails closed across route, selector, share, PDF, history, and compare surfaces.
gap_register.evidence: Existing v1 asset flags are local to individual files; no result_page_v2 selector_qa_policy package exists.

gap_register.finding: Activity, exploration, feedback, and aspiration tables are broad but not normalized into V2 scenario/action_plan selector registries.
gap_register.evidence: activity_task_examples has 360 rows, next_exploration_nodes has 270 rows, and feedback_action_lab has 204 rows; no V2 scenario registry exists.

gap_register.finding: Most substantive v1 assets are zh-CN only; en assets exist mainly for FAQ, method boundary, share/PDF/history, and technical summary.
gap_register.evidence: The 9 JSONL tables are zh-CN only. en JSON assets exist for faq, professional_method_boundary, share_pdf_history, and technical_note_user_summary.

gap_register.finding: The PR3 strict harness reports 13 forbidden-term hits in the existing RIASEC v1 corpus.
gap_register.evidence: cd backend && APP_ENV=testing php artisan riasec:result-page-v2-agent audit --strict --json --no-ansi exits 1 with strict_failures=["forbidden_public_payload_leaks"], validation_error_count=0, leak_hit_count=13.
